About the Faculty of Medicine

Üsküdar University, which makes significant contributions to higher education as a thematic university in the fields of Behavioral and Health Sciences, officially established the Faculty of Medicine on March 15, 2018 with the aim of being high quality and universal. At the Faculty of Medicine, future physicians are trained as scientists and equipped with the necessary competencies for medical practice. Üsküdar University has become prominent especially in the field of health and has become one of the higher education institutions that train professionals in many fields of health professions in our country. The Faculty of Medicine has been planned and established at the highest level in terms of infrastructure and academic equipment.

Üsküdar University Faculty of Medicine

The Faculty of Medicine has a full-fledged, 100-bed

NPiSTANBUL Brain Hospital

, which has completed its cooperation with the approval of the Council of Higher Education, as well as a cooperation with

, which is also full-fledged and has a capacity of 143 beds.

Our faculty has a physical infrastructure of 7 thousand square meters that can meet all its needs. It has a rich library. In addition, there are application/research centers and multidisciplinary laboratories such as

Neuropsychopharmacology Application and Research Center (NPFUAM), Neuropsychiatry Health Application and Research Center (NPSUAM), Experimental Research Unit (ÜSKÜDAB), Üsküdar University Medical Radiation Application and Research Center (ÜSMERA), Personalized Treatment Application and Research Center (KİMER)

. With these facilities, it has reached universal quality standards in both medical education and health services.

Our students, who achieve high success in the Student Selection Examination and are admitted to Üsküdar University Faculty of Medicine with at least half scholarship and one-third full scholarship, graduate as modern physicians who are willing to research and publish, follow and apply innovations, and can see ahead in all fields of medicine.

Our Faculty of Medicine has two programs, one in

Turkish

and the other in

English

.

Hybrid Education Model (Integrated + Problem-Based Learning Model)

is applied in our medical education. This education consists of 3 phases:

Pre-Clinical Internship Period, Clinical Internships

and

Internship

, where

Basic

and

Clinical Sciences

are integrated.

Faculty of Medicine Courses

Courses to be taken by students in the Pre-Clinical Internship Period; Scientific Foundations of Medicine, Anatomy, Physiology, Histology and Embryology, Medical Pharmacology, Medical Biochemistry, Medical Microbiology, Biophysics, Biostatistics, Medical Biology and Genetics, Pathology, Medical Education, Medical Ethics and History of Medicine, Public Health, Forensic Medicine, Medical Skills and First Aid, Positive Psychology, Communication Skills, Humanities in Medicine, Health Management, Sociology of Health, Health Economics, Health Informatics and Preparation for Clinic.

Courses to be taken by students in the Pre-Clinical Internship Period; Scientific Foundations of Medicine, Anatomy, Physiology, Histology and Embryology, Medical Pharmacology, Medical Biochemistry, Medical Microbiology, Biophysics, Biostatistics, Medical Biology and Genetics, Pathology, Medical Education, Medical Ethics and History of Medicine, Public Health, Forensic Medicine, Medical Skills and First Aid, Positive Psychology, Communication Skills, Humanities in Medicine, Health Management, Health Sociology, Health Economics, Health Informatics and Clinic Preparation.

Clinical Internships Period; Internal Medicine, Obstetrics and Gynecology, General Surgery, Pediatrics, Anesthesiology and Reamination, Radiology, Cardiology, Skin and Venereal Diseases, Infectious Diseases, Orthopedics and Traumatology, Urology, Ophthalmology, Ear Nose and Throat Diseases, Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation, Nuclear Medicine, Radiation Oncology, Psychiatry, Child and Adolescent Mental Health, Neurology, Brain and Nerve Surgery, Pediatric Surgery, Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery, Cardiovascular Surgery, Thoracic Surgery, Emergency Medicine.

Rotations of the internship period include Emergency Medicine, Pediatrics, Internal Medicine, General Surgery, Public Health, Obstetrics and Gynecology, Psychiatry, Neurology, Skin and Venereal Diseases.

Faculty of Medicine Ayhan Songar Library

Ayhan Songar Faculty of Medicine library has two floors, an area of 550 m2 with a seating capacity of 122 people, 22 printed journals, 6 group study rooms, infrastructure and screen-supported technology to provide all kinds of audio-visual connections in the rooms, 54,193 e-journals, including over 22,000 e-journals only in the field of medicine and health sciences.193 e-journals, including over 22,000 e-journals in the field of medicine and health sciences, 6,237 printed books, a total of 400,620 e-book collections, including 15,314 e-books related only to the field of medicine, 58 database subscriptions (JoVe, Cocharane Library, Elsevier ClinicalKey, Dynamed, Medline, Springer e-book, Nature Magazine, etc.). In addition, within the framework of cooperation with other universities, publications are provided in all our libraries for education and research activities.
